prompt: Create a bright studio fashion photo of three young adult female cheerleaders posing together against a seamless vivid orange backdrop. The scene contains exactly three performers: the left cheerleader wears a sparkling blue two-piece cheer uniform with silver-and-white trim and a large blue hair bow, leans diagonally with one arm raised holding a silver pom-pom; the center cheerleader wears a sparkling red two-piece cheer uniform with gold-and-white trim, a red hair bow, stands front and center with one hand on her hip and holds metallic gold pom-poms; the right cheerleader wears a sparkling green two-piece cheer uniform with white-and-silver trim and a green hair bow, performs a dramatic vertical high kick with one leg lifted straight upward, holding white pom-poms. All three wear short pleated skirts, white crew socks with colored stripes matching their outfits, and clean white athletic sneakers. Use glossy sequin fabric, crisp studio lighting, vibrant saturated colors, full-body vertical composition, energetic dance-team pose, dynamic hair movement, polished commercial photography style, sharp details on uniforms and pom-poms, smooth orange floor blending into the backdrop, and faces covered by simple square pixelated blur masks for anonymity.
